channel.title: Krishnaraj R — Articles
channel.description: Technical and leadership articles from Krishnaraj R.

item.title: Engineering Culture at Scale: Beyond the Code
item.description: Fostering high-performance engineering cultures in distributed teams.

item.title: Mentorship as a Force Multiplier
item.description: Building repeatable mentorship systems that scale leadership.

item.title: Event-Driven Microservices: Patterns and Pitfalls
item.description: Contracts, tracing, and failure recovery in asynchronous systems.

item.title: Advanced Caching Strategies for High-Traffic Systems
item.description: Layered caching techniques and invalidation strategies.
